title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 7437 / 53 OG No. 22, 8051 (November 30, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2016, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item B-004.36, title B, appendix A of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen, is amended to read as follows:

"B-004.36: Mindoro-Tomas Claudio and Echabelita Streets, Paco, Manila :GR :15.00 :3 :15.00: : : : : :4: : asphalt paving."

SEC. 2. Item B-004.44, title B, appendix A of the same Act, is amended to read as follows:

"B-004.44:

Construction of waiting shed in corner Herran and Calderon Streets :GR :10 :10 :10: :::::::: Improvement.

"B-004.44-

a

:

Asphalt paving of Liwayway Street, Sta. Ana :GR :8 :8 :8: ::::::::."

SEC. 3. Item B-004.40, title B, appendix A of the same Act, is amended to read as follows:

"B-004.40: Asphalt paving of Kansas Street (from Vermont to San Andres :GR :12:12.00:12.00: : : : :8.00: : : : Improvement."

SEC. 4. Item 21, subsection g, section two of the same Act, is amended by adding a new item thereof for the City of Manila:

"21-

a

. Construction of Rizal's Monument at the corner of

Penafrancia and Zamora Street

P10,000.00.

"21-

b

. Improvement of Sases Puericulture Center

P11,000.00.

"21-

c

. Construction of public plaza at Fabie Estate, Paco

P8,000.00."

SEC. 5. Item 25, subsection g, section two of the same Act for the City of Manila is amended to read as follows:

"25. Asphalting and construction of curb and gutter of Vermont Street, from Singalong Street to San Marcelino Street, Malate

P5,000.00."

SEC. 6. Item 28, subsection g, section two of the same Act, is amended by adding a new item thereof for the City of Manila:

"28. Asphalting and construction of curb

and gutter of Taal Street, from San

Andres Street, to Esguerra Street, Sta. Ana

P10,000.00."

;"28-

a

Asphalt paving for Cortada Street from

San Luis to A. Flores, Ermita

P5,000.00."

SEC. 7. Item (

f

), for the City of Manila, group IV, subparagraph 28, subsection f, section two, and item 22, for the City of Manila, subsection g, section two of the same Act, are hereby repealed.

SEC. 8. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
